name: Almond Poppy Seed Tea Bread
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1. In a large bowl, combine 1/4 cup Orange Juice and 3/4 cup Sugar. Stir until the sugar is fully dissolved.
2. Add 1/2 teaspoon Vanilla Extract and 1/2 teaspoon Almond Extract to the mixture. Stir well.
3. Heat the glaze ingredients in a saucepan over low heat until it reaches a smooth consistency.
4. Grease two large tins or line them with parchment paper.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, baking powder, eggs, milk, oil, vanilla extract, almond flavoring, and poppy seeds until well combined.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared tins.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the tins for about 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Once cooled, brush the tops of the loaves with the glaze using a pastry brush.
10. Allow the glaze to harden before wrapping or serving. Enjoy!
